title: Cholown #2473
definition:
Holon = "sandy"

 1) a town in the mountains of Judah given to the priests
 2) a city of Moab; site unknown
nasbUsage:
Definition: Holon = "sandy"

 1) a town in the mountains of Judah given to the priests
 2) a city of Moab; site unknown

    NASB:  a place in Moab, also a city in Judah
